channel.title: Android on My Linux Journey
channel.description: Recent content in Android on My Linux Journey

item.title: Install Google Apps on LineageOS - GApps Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Guide to installing Google Apps on LineageOS after flashing custom ROM. Covers GApps packages, recovery flashing, and post-install configuration.

item.title: Advanced ADB Shell Commands for Android Devices
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Advanced ADB shell commands for Android devices - both rooted and unrooted. Covers debugging, performance tuning, package control, logs, networking, and system inspection.

item.title: Mount Android Phone on Linux - File Transfer Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Guide to mounting Android phone on Linux for file transfer. Covers MTP protocol, USB debugging mode, and troubleshooting mount point errors.

item.title: Install Bliss OS on Linux: Step-by-Step GRUB Guide (2025)
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Manual installation guide for Bliss OS on Linux. Covers ISO download, GRUB configuration, data partition setup, kernel boot parameters, and common troubleshooting steps.
